mandatory_clauses.description: Full names and addresses of both employer and employee
Approved remote work location(s) including home address
Expected number of in-office days per week or month (if hybrid)
Agreed weekly working hours and reachability expectations
Notice period for both employer and employee
Which party provides and pays for equipment (laptop, internet, ergonomic setup)
Home office cost reimbursement or tax-free allowance (thuiswerkkostenvergoeding)
Vakantiegeld of at least 8% of gross salary
